keyManagement.title: Key Management
keyManagement.description: Manage encryption keys, support export for backup and import for recovery
keyManagement.exportKeyDescription: Export the current master key for backup. The key is sensitive, please keep it safe
keyManagement.exportKeyDialogDescription: Your encryption key has been generated. Please copy and save it securely. Never share it with others
keyManagement.resetAllDataDescription: Clear all model configurations and chat records, generate a new encryption key
